name: S-13 freshness gate --skip-fresh writes an operator-bypass audit entry per §2.17 audit contract
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/freshness-gate.sh" --source-id src --fetch-frequency daily --now 2026-05-25T10:00:00Z --skip-fresh --emit-audit audit.jsonl && [ -s audit.jsonl ] && grep -q '"action":"skip-fresh"' audit.jsonl && echo bypassed 1>&2
